description_long: This object consists of a neatly arranged stack of ten thin magazines or books, each with a distinctive yellow border and glossy covers. The frontmost book features a vibrant, detailed illustration of a spacecraft and celestial bodies, suggesting a science or nature theme. The spines are uniformly yellow with black text, giving the collection a cohesive and recognizable appearance. The back covers display various modern, minimalist designs, some with images of interior spaces and lighting fixtures. The books are relatively thin, with visible white pages sandwiched between the colored covers. The overall presentation is clean, organized, and visually striking, making the set easily identifiable in an urban environment.
description: A stack of ten thin, yellow-bordered magazines with glossy, illustrated covers and uniform spines, arranged in a neat row. The front cover features a vivid space-themed image, while the backs show modern, minimalist designs.
description_view_0: The spines of the books are visible, showing yellow color and black text, with the thinness of each book emphasized.
description_view_1: The front covers are visible, with the foremost book displaying a detailed space-themed illustration and the others partially visible behind it.
description_view_2: The opposite edges of the books are shown, highlighting the white pages and the thin profile of each book.
description_view_3: The back covers are visible, featuring modern, minimalist designs and images, with a focus on interior decor and lighting.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the front cover depicts a detailed, realistic rendering of a spacecraft in space, with planets and stars in the background. The style is vibrant and visually engaging, with a focus on scientific and astronomical imagery.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are bright yellow with black text running horizontally, creating a uniform and easily recognizable appearance. There are no decorative patterns, only text.
